UserProject.title: UserProject
UserProject.description: A representation of an AI-generated website design created by a logged-in user, stored securely in an isolated subcollection.

projectId.description: Unique alphanumeric ID of the project.

userId.description: The UID of the user owning this project.

name.description: The custom title of the generated design.

description.description: Synopsis of the layout and purpose.

css.description: The custom CSS rules and styles.

updatesCount.description: Total number of code edits or updates.

visitorsCount.description: Total simulated or actual public views count.

isPublished.description: Whether this project is published instantly.

publishedUrl.description: The unique public URL mapped for direct access.

isPublic.description: Whether the project is visible in the public community gallery.

likes.description: Array of user UIDs who liked the project.

clonesCount.description: Number of times this project was duplicated or cloned.

originalPrompt.description: The prompt original prompt word used to generate this site.

creatorName.description: Display name of the site creator.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last edit.

ProjectComment.title: ProjectComment
ProjectComment.description: A representation of a developer or visitor comment left on a public community project.

commentId.description: The unique ID for the comment doc.

projectId.description: Reference project ID where the comment was posted.

text.description: Text of the actual query/feedback review comment.

users/{userId}/projects/{projectId}.description: User specific subcollection containing their AI-generated premium web projects.

public_projects/{projectId}.description: Global user projects that are marked toggle public for community and clones.

public_projects/{projectId}/comments/{co.description: User feedback, suggestions, and collaborative comments under each public project.
